entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop studied in the experiment, consisting of 20 genotypes including advanced breeding lines and released varieties

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the research experiment was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research experiment was conducted

entities.name: MID-SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress imposed by withholding irrigation between 50-100 days after sowing

entities.name: END SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought stress imposed by withholding irrigation from 100 days after sowing until final harvest

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The overall production of the groundnut crop

entities.name: NUMBER OF MATURE PODS
entities.description: The count of mature pods per plant

entities.name: 100-KERNEL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 kernels of groundnut

entities.name: SOUND MATURE KERNEL PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The percentage of kernels that are sound and mature

entities.name: OIL PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The percentage of oil content in the groundnut kernels

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total above-ground biomass

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The percentage of kernel weight relative to pod weight

entities.name: GENOTYPE ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between the genetic makeup of the groundnut genotypes and the environmental conditions

entities.name: SEED MATURATION
entities.description: The biological process of seeds reaching maturity

entities.name: OIL FORMATION
entities.description: The biological process of oil accumulation in the seeds
